old_tom.name: Old Tom
old_tom.personality: Grizzled veteran who tells tall tales. Drinks too much. Surprisingly sharp when sober. Nostalgic about his adventuring days.
old_tom.dialogue_style: Rambling storyteller. Starts sentences with 'Back in my day...' Gruff but warm.
old_tom.knowledge: Old dungeon layouts, monster weaknesses, outdated adventuring tips. Claims to have fought a dragon once. Knows local history.

indifferent: The old crypt is north of town
friendly: The drake's lair had three exits
helpful: Secret passage behind the altar in the crypt
The old commander's sword is still down there

old_tom.greeting: Eh? Another young fool looking for glory? Pull up a chair.

mode_prompts.chatting: Nursing his ale, eyes distant with memory.
mode_prompts.warning: Grabs your arm with surprising strength.
mode_prompts.recruiting: Straightens up, a glint of the old fire in his eyes.
